title: SubmitOutput
description: Main-surface output envelope for the submit primitive. FR-001, FR-004, FR-005.

transaction_id.description: Deterministic per invocation (content-hash of input + adapter-declared nonce) — FR-004.

status.description: Terminal/non-terminal adapter disposition. Failed adapter invocations surface as failed|rejected, never as an unhandled exception — FR-005.

adapter_receipt.description: Opaque adapter-specific receipt (e.g. carrier reference, 접수번호, payment authorization code). Main envelope does NOT narrow this shape.
